title: Dancing in the Dark
why_this_song: Dancing in the Dark by Bruce Springsteen (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Even if we're just dancin' in the dark"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dancin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dancin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I get up in the evenin'
I check my look in the mirror
They say you gotta stay hungry

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And I ain't got nothin' to say
Even if we're just dancin' in the dark

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bruce Springsteen one question about "Dancing in the Dark", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bruce Springsteen sobre "Dancing in the Dark", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Dancing in the Dark" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Dancing in the Dark" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Dancing in the Dark" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Dancing in the Dark" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
